open_questions.detail: Third CGI tree variant found in TFPM042FB but not in our 4-tree scope. Active or test?
D01 has CM001 method that P01 does not. P01 has CM002 instead. Method-level swap.
D01-only since 2019, no P01 evidence — dead?
28 country dispatchers extracted. Only some get exercised by actual UNESCO traffic. Process mining can quantify which countries actually have vendor payments via CGI tree.
